properties.description: Master orchestration pipeline. Executes Bronze ingestion, Silver transformations, and Gold aggregations in sequence. Each layer depends on the successful completion of the previous one.

activities.name: Execute Bronze Ingestion
activities.description: Run the Bronze layer ingestion pipeline to land raw data into the lakehouse.

activities.name: Execute Silver Transformations
activities.description: Run the Silver layer transformation pipeline after Bronze succeeds.

activities.name: Execute Gold Aggregations
activities.description: Run the Gold layer aggregation pipeline after Silver succeeds.
